privileged_info_summary: The task uses the Natural Earth ne_110m_admin_0_countries dataset, a real, freely-available public dataset containing country boundaries with a pop_est (population estimate) attribute for each country. The style name is 'population_choropleth', created in the 'ne' workspace and applied to the 'ne:ne_countries' layer. The choropleth uses a 5-class YlOrRd (Yellow-Orange-Red) ColorBrewer sequential color scheme (#ffffb2 to #bd0026) for classifying countries by population. Strokes are gray (#999999), labels use the country 'name' attribute with dark gray text (#333333) and white halos. GeoServer 2.25.2 with PostGIS 3.3 backend is used. The output is a WMS-generated PNG saved to /home/ga/output/population_map.png.
